summary: Backend developer with experience building server-side applications using Node.js, JavaScript/TypeScript, MongoDB, and Redis. Interested in backend, Linux, and core engineering roles requiring strong CS fundamentals and practical problem solving.

Technical Skills.label: Backend Development
Technical Skills.details: Node.js, REST APIs, Authentication, Asynchronous Programming

Technical Skills.label: Engineering Fundamentals
Technical Skills.details: DSA, OOP, Operating Systems, DBMS, Computer Networks, Concurrency, Multithreading

projects.name: **[Storra (Cloud Storage Platform)](https://github.com/Raqibreyaz/Personal-Google-Drive)** | Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, Redis
projects.summary: A secure cloud storage platform with role-based access control, file sharing, and robust authentication integration.
highlights: Architected a secure cloud storage API supporting file uploads, downloads, streaming previews, and metadata management.
Engineered a robust Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) system with granular global and user-specific file sharing permissions.
Implemented inclusive authentication flows combining OTP verification with external OAuth integrations (Google, GitHub).
Fortified infrastructure against critical security vulnerabilities including SQL Injection, XSS, CSRF, and DoS attacks.

projects.name: **[Banaras Mart (Ecommerce App)](https://github.com/Raqibreyaz/Banaras-Mart)** | Node.js, Express, MongoDB, Razorpay
projects.summary: A role-based multi-vendor e-commerce platform with secure JWT authentication, product management, and Razorpay payment integration.
highlights: Developed a comprehensive e-commerce backend supporting product management, cart states, and user wishlists.
Engineered efficient product discovery APIs featuring advanced database filtering and dynamic pagination.
Integrated the Razorpay API to securely process transactions and orchestrate seamless checkout workflows.
Implemented a secure user management system handling registration, authentication, and password recovery.
